positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest: glowing bioluminescent flora, giant glowing mushrooms, and interconnected roots forming a magical portal. The style should be Neo-Art Nouveau combined with detailed scientific illustration (like vintage natural history plates). Use deep midnight blues, vibrant electric magentas, and luminous teal accents against a dark, silhouetted background. Emphasize clean, defined lines, strong contrasts, and intricate organic patterns. The composition must be centralized and suitable for direct printing on apparel, like a repeating tapestry motif. Fantasy, dreamy, mythical, highly detailed, screen-print aesthetic, deep focus, high contrast, symmetrical composition.
negative: blur, smudged, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, trademark, poor anatomy, ugly, malformed, extra limbs, bad hands, low contrast, cartoon, simple sketch
